headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. Ensure tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for large sizes.

body.usage: Use for all body copy, forms, and small UI elements.

spacing_and_layout.general: Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) to let content breathe. Avoid cramped containers.
spacing_and_layout.customer_app: Mobile-first approach. Use sticky bottom navigation, thumb-friendly CTAs, and simplified card stacks for properties. Hide exact address visually with a blurred map overlay until unlocked.
spacing_and_layout.rider_app: High-contrast utility mode. Large tap targets, swipe-to-accept gestures, and prominent live-map integration.
spacing_and_layout.admin_dashboard: The 'Control Room' Bento Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with tight gaps (gap-4). Every pixel utilized, no jagged bottoms. Keep metrics top-left.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Solid background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no default shadow. Hover adds slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.

components.strategy: Hybrid. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing/hero sections. Use highly customized Shadcn UI components for app functionality (forms, dialogs, cards, sheets).
components.buttons: rounded-md, solid colors for primary. Use Terracotta (#E07A5F) for main actions (Book Visit, Lock Property). Use Forest Green for success actions (Start Visit, Verify OTP).
components.inputs: Shadcn input/select. Customize to have slightly warmer background (bg-white) and distinct focus ring (focus:ring-brand-primary).
components.maps: OpenStreetMap with custom minimalist tiles if possible, or grayscale overlay via CSS filter. Use brand colors for map pins.
components.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog/Sheet. Must have a backdrop-blur-sm on the overlay.

motion.hover: Subtle transform (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase on cards.

icons.style: Clean, line-based, consistent stroke width (1.5px to 2px).

media.usage_rules: Property photos MUST use a max-height limit on mobile (max-h-[60vh] to max-h-[80vh]). Overlays on hero images must not exceed bg-black/40. Map elements should use a blur filter until unlocked by payment.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on brand colors meets 4.5:1 ratio. Terracotta button with White text is required.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='book-visit-button').
accessibility.focus: Visible focus states required on all form inputs and links.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement navigation bars for Customer, Rider, and Admin views separately. Customer app uses mobile-first bottom/sticky tabs.
For the Customer property view, blur the map/location area using Tailwind 'blur-md' and overlay a locked icon/CTA to 'Pay ₹200 to Unlock Visit'.
Admin dashboards MUST use the Bento Grid strategy for analytics, utilizing a high-density, sharp layout.
Use standard OpenStreetMap iframe/integration but apply 'filter: grayscale(80%) sepia(20%)' to fit the earthy theme.
Ensure Shadcn components are fully configured in the project, particularly Dialog, Sheet, Button, Input, and Cards.
Do NOT use raw <input> or <select> tags. ALWAYS use Shadcn.
Rider 'Accept Visit' screens should feature high-visibility Terracotta/Green buttons and large legible text for field conditions.
